articles.title: French city of Nice marks 10th anniversary of terrorist attack
articles.summary: France marks the 10-year anniversary of the 2016 Nice Bastille Day truck attack. The attacker, Mohamed Lahouaiej Bouhlel, drove his truck into a crowd along the “promenade des Anglais" who had gathered to watch fireworks - killing 86 people. While Bouhlel was killed by police on the same night, eight people are accused of helping him with the attack.
